summary: The test suite provides solid coverage of core parsing, license classification, and compliance reporting functionality. Unit tests are well-organized and test the happy path thoroughly. Integration tests validate the full workflow through act. However, coverage gaps exist: main.ts error paths (file I/O, config parsing) are not unit tested; edge cases like special characters in package names, whitespace variations, and stress testing are missing. Design is clean for unit tests but integration tests have brittleness issues: hardcoded file lists in act tests, complex beforeAll blocks with poor error handling, and duplication between act-integration.test.ts and workflow.test.ts. The suite would catch most regressions in core logic but may miss error-handling regressions and boundary condition failures.
